_notes: M1 H1 gen-1. Single-record store: r-core load-bearing on L2s. No filler records — cautionary carry from gen-1 eligibility noise was crowding the active record in gen-2 (codex geometry review).
question: What is the deployment rollback token? Reply with the token only.

records.text: Operations runbook: the deployment rollback token is rollback-alpha. Use this token to authorize rollback.
